task: Sample 20% of the dataframe with replacement for bootstrapping
error_location: line 1: frac=0.1 samples 10%, and replace=False disallows replacement
clarification_query: What parameters produce a 20% sample with replacement?
explanation: frac=0.1 draws 10% of rows and replace=False prevents resampling. Bootstrap requires frac=0.2 and replace=True.
